raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta buhs ta Rohbescha no
Aubras / AzarEnons / Rohbe-
scha no Damaskus / un zittas
prett Seemeta Weekas/ un ta
Rohbescha no Eemata/ un fchis
buhs ta Seemeta-Puffe.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un to Rihta-Puffi buhs
jums mehroht starp Aweranu
un starp Damaskus/ un starp
Gileadu/ un starp Israëta Sem-
imt lihds Jardaanim/ no tahs
Rohbeschäs lihds tai Juhear
prett Rihta-Puffi. Un fchis irr
ta Rihta-Puffe.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un ta Deenas-Widdus
Puffe prett Deenas-Widdum/
laid irr no Tahmara lihds tam
Bahrschanas-Uhdentim no Rahde-
fa / un tad fez tahs Uppes lihds
tai leelai Juhear. Un fchi buhs
ta Deenas-Widdus Puffe prett
Deenas-Widdum.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un ta Wakkara-Puffe
laid irr ta leela Juhear/ no tahs
Rohbeschäs / känehr nahk us
Eematu. Schi buhs ta Wak-
kara-Puffe.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un jums buhs scho Sem-
mi juhsu Starpâ tsdallihht pehz
Israëta Ziltim.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un kad juhs to paschu
jums par Eemantofschann liefeet
peekristees / tad buhs tas arr-
Dtan preekfch teem Sweschinee-
keem / kas juhsit Starpâ dsh-
wo/ un starp jums Behrnus irr
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Teem buhs lihds ar ju
eemantoht to Israëta Zil
Widdin/ ir tai Zilti/ pee ku
tas Sweschineeks dshwo/
buhs jums wixxam weenu
nantofschann doht / sakka
Kungs KUNGS.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Chee nu irr to Zil
Wahrdi: No Seem-
Puffes fahnis to
no Ettona/ fur nahk us Ge
tu/ AzarEnons / ta Rohbe-
no Damaskus prett Seem-
Puffi/ fahnis Gematu/ ta-
ire preekfcb Danna/ weena
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un pee Danna Rohbe-
no Rihta-Puffes lihds Wa-
ra Puffei/ buhs preekfch
ka weena Datta.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un pee Ahsera Rohbe-
no Rihta-Puffes lihds Wa-
ra-Puffei/ buhs preekfch
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un pee Nawtaka Ro-
schas no Rihta-Puffes
Wakkara-Puffei / buhs n
Datta preekfch Manaffus.
"
    }
  ],
